name: Promo Card
description: Editorial promotion with stacked or image-overlay layouts, responsive crops and a safe call to action. Use it inside a Promo Grid.

attribute_definition_groups.name: Promo Card
attribute_definition_groups.description: Editorial promotion with stacked or image-overlay layouts, responsive crops and a safe call to action. Use it inside a Promo Grid.

attribute_definitions.name: Description
attribute_definitions.description: Supporting copy displayed with the promotional heading.

attribute_definitions.name: Image
attribute_definitions.description: Promotional image selected from the content library. Its configured focal point is respected.

attribute_definitions.name: Image alternative text
attribute_definitions.description: Describe informative images. When empty, the card title is used as the alternative text.

attribute_definitions.name: Decorative image
attribute_definitions.description: Enable when the image adds no information beyond the card title and copy.

attribute_definitions.name: CTA label
attribute_definitions.description: Link label. The CTA is hidden until both a label and destination are provided.

attribute_definitions.name: CTA destination
attribute_definitions.description: Internal or external destination for the call to action.

attribute_definitions.name: Show background
attribute_definitions.description: Applies the storefront card surface behind the content.

attribute_definitions.name: Show border
attribute_definitions.description: Displays the semantic storefront border around the card.

attribute_definitions.name: Eyebrow
attribute_definitions.description: Optional short label shown above the card title.

attribute_definitions.name: Layout
attribute_definitions.description: Stack content below the image or place it in a readable panel over the image.

attribute_definitions.name: Image aspect ratio
attribute_definitions.description: Editorial crop applied while preserving the image focal point.

attribute_definitions.name: CTA style
attribute_definitions.description: Semantic storefront treatment for the call to action.

attribute_definitions.name: Hover effect
attribute_definitions.description: Optional motion-safe lift or image zoom. Keyboard focus always remains visible.
